title: UTA Test Runs Comparison
description: All recorded test sessions, filterable by product. Pick any number of runs and overlay their interlude metrics against ELAPSED-TIME-SINCE-START — different runs anchor at t=0 so the curves can be compared regardless of when each test was actually executed. Time picker is intentionally hidden; the X axis is elapsed h:m parsed straight from the line prefix (no wall-clock math).

list.name: controller
list.label: Controller
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT controller FROM uta.test_sessions FINAL WHERE controller != '' ORDER BY controller

list.name: fw_version
list.label: Firmware
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT firmware_version FROM uta.test_sessions FINAL WHERE firmware_version != '' AND match(controller, '${controller:regex}') ORDER BY firmware_version

list.name: nand_type
list.label: NAND
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT nand_type FROM uta.test_sessions FINAL WHERE nand_type != '' AND match(controller, '${controller:regex}') ORDER BY nand_type

list.name: test_purpose
list.label: Test Purpose
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT test_purpose FROM uta.test_sessions FINAL WHERE test_purpose != '' ORDER BY test_purpose

list.name: slot_id
list.label: Slot
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT slot_id FROM uta.test_sessions FINAL WHERE slot_id != '' AND match(controller, '${controller:regex}') AND match(firmware_version, '${fw_version:regex}') AND match(nand_type, '${nand_type:regex}') AND match(test_purpose, '${test_purpose:regex}') ORDER BY slot_id

list.name: runs
list.label: Runs to compare
list.description: Pick any number of test runs (log files). Their interlude curves are overlaid against elapsed time.
list.query: SELECT log_filename FROM uta.test_sessions FINAL WHERE log_filename != '' AND match(controller, '${controller:regex}') AND match(firmware_version, '${fw_version:regex}') AND match(nand_type, '${nand_type:regex}') AND match(test_purpose, '${test_purpose:regex}') AND match(slot_id, '${slot_id:regex}') ORDER BY last_seen_at DESC

list.name: metric
list.label: Sidecar metric
list.description: Any of the ~300 keys captured per snapshot. Used by the 'Custom metric' comparison panel.
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT key FROM uta.interlude_metrics WHERE log_filename IN (${runs:sqlstring}) AND value_num IS NOT NULL ORDER BY key

options.content:
## Test Runs Comparison
All sessions filterable by product. Select runs in the **Runs to compare** dropdown and the panels below overlay them against elapsed time since each run started. The X axis (`HH:MM:SS`) is *not* wall-clock — it's the relative-time prefix the firmware stamps on every line. Two runs from different days line up at `t=0`. [← Back to Lab Grid](/d/uta-lab-grid-v1/)

panels.title: All test runs (filtered)
panels.description: One row per ingested log file. Click a log_filename → Board Detail. Use the 'Runs to compare' dropdown above to overlay any subset on the comparison panels below.

targets.rawSql: SELECT log_filename, slot_id, toString(status) AS status, controller, replaceAll(interface, '_', ' ') AS interface, patch_version, release_candidate, firmware_version, nand_type, nand_density, package_density, test_purpose, started_at, last_snapshot_at, snapshot_count AS snapshots, session_elapsed_s_max AS duration FROM uta.test_sessions FINAL WHERE log_filename != '' AND match(controller, '${controller:regex}') AND match(firmware_version, '${fw_version:regex}') AND match(nand_type, '${nand_type:regex}') AND match(test_purpose, '${test_purpose:regex}') AND match(slot_id, '${slot_id:regex}') ORDER BY last_seen_at DESC

panels.title: Selected runs — quick stats
panels.description: Just the runs you picked, side-by-side. Useful sanity check before reading the comparison curves.

targets.rawSql: SELECT log_filename, slot_id, controller, firmware_version, nand_type, test_purpose, toString(status) AS status, snapshot_count AS snapshots, session_elapsed_s_max AS duration, started_at FROM uta.test_sessions FINAL WHERE log_filename IN (${runs:sqlstring}) ORDER BY started_at

panels.title: WAI / WAF — overlay (X = elapsed since run start)
panels.description: Each line is a (run, metric) pair. WAI=write amplification index, WAF=write amplification factor. Curves anchor at elapsed t=0 so two runs overlap regardless of wall-clock start time.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toDateTime(toUInt32(block_elapsed_s)) AS time, concat(log_filename, ' · WAI') AS metric, wai AS value FROM uta.interlude_snapshots WHERE log_filename IN (${runs:sqlstring}) AND wai IS NOT NULL ORDER BY log_filename, block_elapsed_s UNION ALL SELECT toDateTime(toUInt32(block_elapsed_s)) AS time, concat(log_filename, ' · WAF') AS metric, waf AS value FROM uta.interlude_snapshots WHERE log_filename IN (${runs:sqlstring}) AND waf IS NOT NULL ORDER BY log_filename, block_elapsed_s

panels.title: Erase counts (SLC avg) — overlay
panels.description: Average SLC erase count per snapshot, across the selected runs.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toDateTime(toUInt32(block_elapsed_s)) AS time, log_filename AS metric, ec_slc_avg AS value FROM uta.interlude_snapshots WHERE log_filename IN (${runs:sqlstring}) AND ec_slc_avg IS NOT NULL ORDER BY log_filename, block_elapsed_s

SELECT toDateTime(toUInt32(block_elapsed_s)) AS time, log_filename AS metric, temp_case AS value FROM uta.interlude_snapshots WHERE log_filename IN (${runs:sqlstring}) AND temp_case IS NOT NULL ORDER BY log_filename, block_elapsed_s

SELECT toDateTime(toUInt32(block_elapsed_s)) AS time, log_filename AS metric, latency_avg_us AS value FROM uta.interlude_snapshots WHERE log_filename IN (${runs:sqlstring}) AND latency_avg_us IS NOT NULL ORDER BY log_filename, block_elapsed_s

SELECT toDateTime(toUInt32(block_elapsed_s)) AS time, log_filename AS metric, coalesce(init_bb, 0) + coalesce(rt_bb, 0) AS value FROM uta.interlude_snapshots WHERE log_filename IN (${runs:sqlstring}) ORDER BY log_filename, block_elapsed_s

SELECT toDateTime(toUInt32(block_elapsed_s)) AS time, log_filename AS metric, total_nand_write_bytes AS value FROM uta.interlude_snapshots WHERE log_filename IN (${runs:sqlstring}) AND total_nand_write_bytes IS NOT NULL ORDER BY log_filename, block_elapsed_s

panels.title: Custom metric — ${metric}  (overlay across selected runs)
panels.description: Any of the ~300 sidecar metric keys, plotted across the selected runs against elapsed time.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toDateTime(toUInt32(block_elapsed_s)) AS time, log_filename AS metric, value_num AS value FROM uta.interlude_metrics WHERE log_filename IN (${runs:sqlstring}) AND key = '${metric:raw}' AND value_num IS NOT NULL ORDER BY log_filename, block_elapsed_s

panels.title: Snapshot status timeline (per run, vs elapsed)
panels.description: Coloured bands showing each snapshot's PASSED/FAILED/UNKNOWN status, anchored at run start.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toDateTime(toUInt32(block_elapsed_s)) AS time, log_filename AS metric, block_status AS value FROM uta.interlude_snapshots WHERE log_filename IN (${runs:sqlstring}) AND block_status != '' ORDER BY log_filename, block_elapsed_s
